---
title: "Documentation"
---

**BCFNGS-project-management** is a Shiny app for a project management system for the BCF NGS core facility.

The NGS lab of the Core Facility provides sequencing as a service. We recommend contacting us before the start of your experiment. In collaboration with the Bioinformatics Core Facility, we provide the following services. 

* Assistance with experimental design of the studies (required number of samples and replicates)
* Assistance with the use of NGS open source analysis tools
* Data analysis on a collaborative basis

If you have any further questions, please do not hesitate to [contact us @ omicsdesk](mailto:omicsdesk.biochem.mpg.de)!

# Chapters

- [Quick Start](chapters/quick-start.html)
- [Coverage Calculator](chapters/coverage-calculator.html)
- [Setup & Infrastructure](chapters/setup-infrastructure.html)
- [Git & GitHub](chapters/git-github.html)
- [Deploy & Operations](chapters/deploy-operations.html)
- [LDAP Authentication](chapters/ldap-authentication.html)
- [SQL Handling](chapters/sql-handling.html)
- [Troubleshooting](chapters/troubleshooting.html)
- [Change Log](chapters/change-log.html)
- [Legacy / Archive](chapters/legacy-archive.html)

## How to preview, render, and publish

The Quarto book now lives at the repository root.
That means the standard commands are:

```bash
quarto preview
quarto render
quarto publish gh-pages
```

The book source files are:

- `_quarto.yml`
- `index.qmd`
- `chapters/`

Companion source notes that are not part of the default book render live in:

- `reference/`


This booklet consolidates all operational and technical documentation for the sequencing Shiny app.
